## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] No secrets, real tokens, or private identifiers were added to the diff
- [ ] Docs (README / role instructions / `.env.example`) updated if behavior or config changed
